content:
The Three.js file has been successfully parsed and all meshes have been exported according to the specified structure. Here's a summary of the output:

1. Part-level structure identified:
   - support_structure
   - wheel_structure
   - cabin_0 through cabin_15

2. Individual meshes exported to /root/output/part_meshes/<part_name>/:
   - Each part contains its individual meshes (e.g., base_platform.obj, support_leg_front_left.obj, etc.)
   - Wheel structure contains 66 individual spoke meshes (spoke_front_0.obj through spoke_back_31.obj)
   - Each cabin contains 4 meshes (cabin_arm.obj, cabin_body.obj, cabin_roof.obj, cabin_floor.obj)

3. Combined part meshes exported to /root/output/links/:
   - support_structure.obj
   - wheel_structure.obj
   - cabin_0.obj through cabin_15.obj

The export process completed successfully, and all required files are now available in the specified output directories.
